from collections import OrderedDict
from typing import Dict, List, Any

def build_config() -> OrderedDict:
    return OrderedDict([
        ("host", "localhost"),
        ("port", 8080),
        ("debug", False),
        ("workers", 4),
    ])

def create_headers() -> OrderedDict:
    headers = OrderedDict()
    headers["Content-Type"] = "application/json"
    headers["Authorization"] = "Bearer token123"
    headers["Accept"] = "application/json"
    return headers

def group_by_status(items: List[dict]) -> OrderedDict:
    grouped: OrderedDict = OrderedDict()
    for item in items:
        status = item["status"]
        if status not in grouped:
            grouped[status] = []
        grouped[status].append(item)
    return grouped

def build_response(data: Any, meta: dict) -> OrderedDict:
    response = OrderedDict()
    response["data"] = data
    response["meta"] = meta
    response["links"] = {}
    return response
